title: inula verbascifolia subsp. parnassica
intro: Inula verbascifolia subsp. parnassica is a subspecies of the Inula verbascifolia plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to Greece and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting immunomodulatory effects. Inula verbascifolia subsp. parnassica can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and it can also be used to make teas, tinctures, and other herbal preparations for various health purposes.
